_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: Our analysis demonstrates that the WMS TM NF1 allele exhibits significant sequence and likely functional homology to the human ortholog. This finding emphasizes the utility of the WMS TM genome as a robust platform for studying NF1-related pathologies
details: WMS TM demonstrates utility as a biomedical research platform for studying NF1-related pathologies with significant sequence and functional homology to human ortholog
